summary: Round 16 is a seven-game post-Origin slate from Friday 19 June to Sunday 21 June. The strongest raw tips are Storm over Raiders and Warriors over Cowboys, but no Round 16 charity bet is locked and the Mark Hughes Foundation ledger remains 3-2 and +$0.53.

sources.label: NRL teams Round 16: Nicho Hynes, Blayke Brailey named
Round 16 team lists: Sharks set to receive double boost
NRL Late Mail Round 16: Origin back-up tracker
NRL Early Mail Round 16: Ezra Mam injury, Sharks and Roosters notes
2026 NRL season results: Round 16 fixture table

scoreboard.note: Lowest-confidence home lean. Newcastle get McDonald Jones Stadium and Kalyn Ponga availability is being watched after Origin, while the Dragons remain without Jaydn Su'a after the pec injury.
Dolphins are still the form lean even with Origin rest across Hamiso Tabuai-Fidow, Selwyn Cobbo and Thomas Flegler. Wests Tigers lose Kai Pearce-Paul long-term and remain volatile.
Penrith are the class side, but this is not a betting lock until final teams confirm the status of Nathan Cleary, Isaah Yeo and Brian To'o after they were listed on reserves.
The Bulldogs come off the bye with Stephen Crichton named, but Manly naming Tom Trbojevic back from a hamstring injury makes this a live Saturday-night trap.
Cleanest travel and spine read. The Warriors get the Auckland home edge while Tom Dearden's return has been delayed by an ankle fracture and North Queensland must travel off a disrupted build.
Strongest raw tip if Melbourne's Origin players back up. The Storm home profile and spine give them the edge over Canberra, even with Raiders reinforcements.
Home lean only. The Roosters regain a stack of Origin talent, but Cronulla's pack strengthens if Addin Fonua-Blake and Briton Nikora back up, while Nicho Hynes remains the key watch.

liveAlerts.text: Round 16 preview is live with seven games and three teams on the bye.
Charity ledger remains 3-2, $31.50 invested, $32.03 returned and +$0.53 settled profit.
No Round 16 charity bet is locked; do not move the ledger without a fresh TAB price, stake and user confirmation.
Strongest raw Round 16 tip: Storm over Raiders, with Origin backup status still the key condition.
Most dangerous Round 16 reads: Bulldogs v Sea Eagles, Titans v Panthers, and Roosters v Sharks.
Broncos, Eels and Rabbitohs are on the Round 16 bye.
